Class CookingStationGui

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.gui.CookingStationGui
public class CookingStationGui extends Object
Builds and updates the custom cooking station inventory GUI.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    FUEL_SLOT
    Slot index of the fuel input.
    static final int[]
    INGREDIENT_SLOTS
    Inventory slots that hold ingredients (internal indices into the 27-slot chest).
    static final int
    OUTPUT_SLOT
    Slot index of the recipe output (take-only).
    static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey
    PLACEHOLDER_KEY
    PDC key stamped on all placeholder glass pane items.
    static final int
    PROGRESS_SLOT
    Slot index of the progress indicator (read-only).
    static final int
    SEPARATOR_SLOT
    Slot index of the arrow separator between ingredient slots and the output (read-only).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory
    build(CookingStationState state, org.bukkit.Material stationType)
    Builds a fresh GUI inventory pre-populated from the given station state.
    static int
    ingredientIndex(int guiSlot)
    Returns the ingredient slot index (0–4) for the given GUI slot, or -1 if not an ingredient slot.
    static boolean
    isEditable(int guiSlot)
    Returns true if items can be freely placed into and taken from this slot.
    static boolean
    isPlaceholder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
     
    void
    update(org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory inv, CookingStationState state)
    Refreshes only the mutable display slots (output, fuel, ingredients, progress) without rebuilding the entire inventory.

  • Field Details

    • INGREDIENT_SLOTS

      public static final int[] INGREDIENT_SLOTS
      Inventory slots that hold ingredients (internal indices into the 27-slot chest).

    • FUEL_SLOT

      public static final int FUEL_SLOT
      Slot index of the fuel input.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROGRESS_SLOT

      public static final int PROGRESS_SLOT
      Slot index of the progress indicator (read-only).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OUTPUT_SLOT

      public static final int OUTPUT_SLOT
      Slot index of the recipe output (take-only).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SEPARATOR_SLOT

      public static final int SEPARATOR_SLOT
      Slot index of the arrow separator between ingredient slots and the output (read-only).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PLACEHOLDER_KEY

      public static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey PLACEHOLDER_KEY
      PDC key stamped on all placeholder glass pane items. Used to distinguish placeholders from real items placed by players.

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingStationGui

      public CookingStationGui()

  • Method Details

    • build

      public org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory build(CookingStationState state, org.bukkit.Material stationType)
      Builds a fresh GUI inventory pre-populated from the given station state.
      Parameters:
      state - the current station state
      stationType - the Material of the block (used to locate it on close)
      Returns:
      the constructed inventory

    • update

      public void update(org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory inv, CookingStationState state)
      Refreshes only the mutable display slots (output, fuel, ingredients, progress) without rebuilding the entire inventory. Safe to call from the tick loop.
      Parameters:
      inv - the open inventory to update
      state - the current station state

    • ingredientIndex

      public static int ingredientIndex(int guiSlot)
      Returns the ingredient slot index (0–4) for the given GUI slot, or -1 if not an ingredient slot.
      Parameters:
      guiSlot - the inventory slot index
      Returns:
      ingredient array index (0–4), or -1

    • isEditable

      public static boolean isEditable(int guiSlot)
      Returns true if items can be freely placed into and taken from this slot. The output slot is editable for taking but placement is handled separately.

    • isPlaceholder

      public static boolean isPlaceholder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
